text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, November 18. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Greg Holloway wants to drop scheduling portal to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of scheduling portal now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
